assignments.name: prompt_input
assignments.value:
={{ "Selected Offer: " + JSON.stringify($json.body.selected_offer) + "
Funnel Data: " + JSON.stringify($json.body.funnel) + "
Messaging Assets: " + JSON.stringify($json.body.narrative) + "
Paid Traffic Context: " + JSON.stringify($json.body.paid_traffic) }}

assignments.name: outbound_plan

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const o = $json.outbound_plan?.outbound_outreach || $json.outbound_plan || {}; const body = 'LeadOS Outbound Outreach Log

Daily Contacts: ' + (o.daily_contacts || 0) + '
Response Rate: ' + (o.response_rate || 0) + '%
Positive Reply Rate: ' + (o.positive_reply_rate || 0) + '%
Meetings/Day: ' + (o.meetings_booked_per_day || 0) + '
Channels: ' + (o.channels || []).join(', ') + '

Note: Outreach simulated only. No emails sent by LeadOS.'; return { properties: { hs_note_body: body, hs_timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const raw = $json.outbound_plan; const parsed = (typeof raw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw) || {}; const o = parsed.outbound_outreach || parsed; const variants = o.message_variants || []; const prospects = o.prospect_simulation || []; const firstMsg = variants[0]?.message || 'Check out our solution'; const firstProspect = prospects[0] || {}; return { personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: 'manishk230604@gmail.com', name: firstProspect.name || 'Prospect' }], subject: 'Quick question about ' + (firstProspect.company || 'your business') }], from: { email: 'manishk230604@gmail.com', name: 'Manish from LeadOS' }, content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: '

' + firstMsg.replace(/\n/g, '
') + '


Sent via LeadOS Autonomous Pipeline

' }], categories: ['leados-outbound', 'agent-7'] }; })() }}
